entries.expectedBehavior: Stay in ADMISSION-APP publish/sync readiness and block live actions behind preflight evidence.
entries.actualBehavior: Initial answer drifted into iOS/TestFlight preflight due to unrelated release docs in repo evidence.

entries.expectedBehavior: STAX self-audit should stay in the STAX commit-readiness lane.
entries.actualBehavior: Initial self-audit leaked ADMISSION-APP/TestFlight/Sheets context from prior evidence.

entries.expectedBehavior: Scrape/data correctness should route to data-contract and field-coverage audit.
entries.actualBehavior: Initial answer routed scrape/data correctness to Sheets publish/sync safety.

entries.expectedBehavior: Supplied ADMISSION-APP coverage audit should advance to the first concrete data gap.
entries.actualBehavior: STAX repeated the same data-contract audit despite already-supplied coverage results.

entries.expectedBehavior: Avg_Total gap audit should stay on coverage and identity drift.
entries.actualBehavior: Safety text saying no publish/sync was run was misread as a Sheets publish/sync task.

entries.expectedBehavior: Brightspace dependency readiness should stay scoped to Brightspace dependency proof.
entries.actualBehavior: Initial answer leaked ADMISSION-APP/iOS/TestFlight context into the Brightspace task.

entries.expectedBehavior: Dogfood self-audit should parse supplied local validation evidence and remain completion-blocked honestly.
entries.actualBehavior: First self-audit treated the one-line shell argument as unstructured text and lacked a specific dogfood campaign completion lane.
